data.name: Sex Simulator - Futanari BDSM
data.detailed_description:
About the game

An interactive sex simulation game featuring visual novel elements, high definition graphics and videos, and realistic-looking characters set in a beautiful decor. You play the role of an experienced Futanari Dominatrix who initiates three curious women into the world of BDSM sex.

Game description

If you enjoyed our Sex Simulator - BDSM series, you’ll like this one even more.
With new girls, added props, and more inciting dialogue, Sex Simulator - Futanari BDSM will stir your blood and fulfill your dirtiest fantasies.

The story continues with a hot and experienced Futanari Dom who will do anything to satisfy her submissive’s needs, in the privacy of her own luxurious dungeon.
Step into her shoes and choose between 3 different women with 3 different personalities.
Help them conquer their fears and test their limits by using your kinky new sex machines and various props on their bodies.
Make them cum and scream your name in pleasure, so they will return for more!

Don’t worry if you're not a great talker, we got this part covered for you.
All you need to do is flex those finger muscles to control the sex motion and make the women achieve orgasm before you run out of stamina.
Pick between 3 different types of sex and feel free to swap between the various camera angles we set up for you so that you won’t miss any of the hot details happening on screen.

You didn’t get it right on the first try? Well…it happens to the best of us.
The good part is you can always try again, and again, and again…until everybody’s satisfied.

Features

90+ HD quality renders
HD animations

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
